task: Week 2 Day 5 — concurrency soak suite per Mr.Long 'Day 5 concurrency soak suite'

harness_extension.added: HarnessOptions interface (poolMax + statementTimeoutMs); withTestDb(opts?) backward-compatible default poolMax=4

deliverables.documentation: cmd-db/output/integration/SOAK_README.md (scenario matrix, run instructions, contention factor rationale, honest gaps)

scenarios.subject: 8 parallel same-nonce → idempotency convergence (1 exec invocation, ≥7 fromCache)
8 parallel gold UPDATEs same player → SERIALIZABLE 40001 retry + final balance exact
8 parallel optimisticUpdate same row → 1 winner + 7 OptimisticConflictError
8 parallel ad12_rollback same txn → 1 actual + 7 previously_rolled_back=true
4 parallel recoverStalePending workers → SKIP LOCKED partitions, total=50 no double-count
8 parallel mismatched payload same nonce → all 8 spoof-detection errors

verification.tsc_strict: EXIT 0 (67 files: +1 soak test, harness modified)
verification.vitest_no_dsn: 1 PASS + 6 SKIPPED graceful for soak; 1 PASS + 11 SKIPPED for integration
verification.aggregate_CMD2_suite: 27 PASS + 17 SKIPPED across 4 test files (anti_dupe 13/13 + wrappers 12/12 + integration 12 + soak 7) / 1.46s

compliance_progress.after_day5: ~99.5% — soak suite closes the last 'true concurrency' coverage gap. Remaining 0.5% = consumer wire (owned by other CMDs) + latency/throughput bench (out of R44 scope).

honest_gaps_day5: S2 40001 retry count is diagnostic only — Postgres MVCC may serialize UPDATEs without conflict; deterministic contract is final gold balance
Latency/throughput bench out of scope (separate harness needed)
Long-duration drift (>1 hour) deferred to release-candidate soak
next_action: Day 6-7: final 12-item self-audit + Week 2 ship report OR continue Mr.Long brief
